name: erenilhan-ux-simplifier
description: UX Simplifier — audits UI complexity and refactors code to reduce cognitive load

plugins.name: ux-simplifier
plugins.description: Analyses any web project's UI complexity and directly refactors the code to reduce cognitive load. Applies UX principles (Hick's Law, Miller's Law, progressive disclosure) used by Stripe, Linear, Notion, and Vercel.
